evidence: Fraud patterns changed after promotional campaign
Feature distribution for transaction_amount shifted significantly
recommended_diagnostics: Statistical tests for data distribution changes
Analysis of feature correlations with target variable
Comparison of model performance on old vs. new payment channels
Evaluation of model performance on pre- and post-promotional campaign data
short_term_actions: Monitor model performance on new payment channel
Adjust decision threshold to maintain desired precision-recall balance
long_term_actions: Incorporate new features to capture changed fraud patterns
Regularly update model to adapt to evolving transaction patterns
reasoning_summary: Model degradation likely due to changes in data distribution and underlying relationships between features and target, driven by increased transaction volume, new payment channel, and altered fraud patterns after promotional campaign.
